features.title: Quest Board
features.description: Transform your daily to-do list into an RPG quest log. Earn XP for every task you complete.

features.title: Habit Management
features.description: Easily create, edit, and categorize your habits. Set difficulty levels to adjust rewards.

features.title: Gamification System
features.description: Level up your character, unlock achievements, and turn productivity into play.

features.title: Streaks
features.description: Maintain daily consistency to build powerful streaks and boost your score multipliers.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Visualize your progress with detailed charts. Identify patterns to optimize your routine.

features.title: Privacy
features.description: Your data is yours. Everything is stored locally on your device with no external tracking.

features.title: Open Source
features.description: Transparent and community-driven. Explore the codebase and contribute on GitHub.

features.title: System Settings
features.description: Tailor the experience to your needs. Customize themes, notifications, and audio.
